name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or architectural improvement
labels: enhancement

## Problem or motivation

<!-- What engineering or user problem does this address? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe the approach. If there are multiple viable options, outline the tradeoffs. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What did you rule out and why? -->

## Scope

<!-- Does this touch the provider abstraction, the RAG pipeline, the queue layer, the API, the UI? -->

## Breaking changes

<!-- Would this require migration, config changes, or break existing API consumers? -->
